research_interests: My research on modern Chinese cinema and culture focuses on the relationship among the aesthetic, the affective, and the political in the making of modern identities. In my first monograph Moulding the Socialist Subject: Cinema and Chinese Modernity 1949-1966 (Brill, 2020), I deploy case studies from popular film genres, movie star culture and rural film exhibition practices to argue that Chinese cinema in 1949-1966, at once an important political instrument, an enjoyable yet instructive form of
